div.title: Android is an operating system built by Google designed for mobile devices.
Linux is an open source kernel.
Algorithms are self-contained sequences that carry out a variety of tasks.
React is an open source JavaScript library used for designing user interfaces.
An API (Application Programming Interface) is a collection of protocols and subroutines for building software.
An awesome list is a list of awesome things curated by the community.
Amazon Web Services provides on-demand cloud computing platforms on a subscription basis.
Machine learning is a way of modeling and interpreting data that allows a piece of software to respond intelligently.
Deep Learning is an artificial neural network composed of many layers.
Data structures are a way of organizing and storing data.
Arduino is an open source platform for building electronic devices.
Go is a programming language built to resemble a simplified version of the C programming language.
A bot is an application that runs automated tasks over the Internet.
Automate your code review with style, quality, security, and test‑coverage checks when you need them.
Vue.js is a JavaScript framework for building interactive web applications.

section.div: 📦 A package manager for the Zig programming language.

Spec-driven development (SDD) for your team's workflow. Kiro style commands that enforce structured requirements→design→tasks workflow and steering, transforming how you build with AI. Support Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor, Github Copilot, Gemini CLI and Windsurf.
Build ultra fast, tiny, and cross-platform desktop apps with Typescript.
